title: Stable Craft
description: Increase FPS, Improve the Experience, Create your Story, Revamped Combat & Lights.
body:
Increase FPS, Improve the Experience, Create your Story, Revamped Combat & Lights.

Small Modpack that works perfectly with Shaders. The objective is to make your gameplay as if it was a film.

Constant Updates.

Made to work in both, multiplayer and client side. Not only client side.

No advantages are given to players because all of them will need the modpack installed.
